channel.title: SparkFit Blog
channel.description: Fitness, workouts and simple nutrition from SparkFit.

item.title: How to Build a Consistent Workout Habit When You Have No Time
item.description: Struggling to fit exercise into a packed schedule? Learn practical, evidence-based strategies to build a consistent workout habit—even when life feels too busy. Includes time-saving workouts, simple nutrition tips, and the best gear for fast results.

item.title: 15-Minute Full-Body Workouts for Busy Schedules: Fast Fitness, Real Results
item.description: Short on time but want to stay fit? Discover effective 15-minute full-body workouts, practical planning tips, and essential home equipment for busy schedules. Includes routines, habit strategies, and recovery advice.

item.title: 15-Minute Full-Body Workouts for Busy Adults: Fast, Effective Routines You Can Stick To
item.description: Pressed for time? Discover science-backed 15-minute full-body workouts designed for busy adults. Get simple routines, practical tips, and the best equipment to maximise results at home or in the gym.
